pages.text: Amir loves Grandma Rabiya’s kitchen. He loves the spices… the smells… and the sizzling sounds. Amir wants to learn to fold Grandma’s famous samoosas.

blocks.text: Amir loves Grandma Rabiya’s kitchen.
He loves the spices… the smells… and the sizzling sounds.
Amir wants to learn to fold Grandma’s famous samoosas.

pages.text: Are samoosas square? No! laughs Amir.

blocks.text: Are samoosas square?
No! laughs Amir.
Are they circles?
they’retriangles! No,Granny,

pages.text: They sing Great- Great - Great - Grandma’s samoosa song. Chop the potatoes chop , chop , chop! Shake in the spices shake , shake, shake! Fold the samoosas fold, fold, fold!

blocks.text: They sing Great- Great - Great - Grandma’s samoosa song.
Chop the potatoes chop , chop , chop! Shake in the spices shake , shake, shake!
Fold the samoosas fold, fold, fold!

pages.text: Amir copies Grandma. Fold the dough once… Fold the dough twice…

blocks.text: Amir copies Grandma. Fold the dough once… Fold the dough twice…

pages.text: Then fill it and fold it and paste it and done! But Amir’s samoosas look…

blocks.text: Then fill it and fold it and paste it and done!
But Amir’s samoosas look…

pages.text: …different. They’re not triangles! I don’t know what shape they are. But they’re not the same! I give up!

blocks.text: …different.
They’re not triangles! I don’t know what shape they are. But they’re not the same! I give up!

pages.text: Things don’t have to be the same, Amir. It’s the ddiiffffeerreennccee that makes the difference! Grandpa Farouk walks in and picks up a special-shaped samoosa …

blocks.text: Things don’t have to be the same, Amir. It’s the ddiiffffeerreennccee that makes the difference!
Grandpa Farouk walks in and picks up a special-shaped samoosa …

pages.text: CRUNCH! Hmmm, now that’s a tasty samoooooosa!

blocks.text: CRUNCH!
Hmmm, now that’s a tasty samoooooosa!

pages.text: You see! Your special-shaped samoosas are a hit. Highfive!

blocks.text: You see! Your special-shaped samoosas are a hit.
Highfive!

pages.text: From that day on Amir would chop , chop , chop! shake , shake, shake! fold, fold, fold! Just like Great-Great-Great-Grandma.
